statement: To build a high-performing, AI-powered life — growing Higney International into a leading FF&E procurement firm, launching meaningful products (wellness, finance, naming), building financial freedom through smart investing, and raising our family with intention and faith. Everything we do moves us closer to a life of purpose, abundance, and legacy.
pillars: HI Operations — FF&E procurement excellence for hospitality clients
Product Ventures — Wellness app, Get Newly Named, Etsy digital products
Financial Freedom — Smart Money trading, XRP conviction, debt-free faith
Family & Faith — Intentional parenting, faith-centered home, baby readiness
